folio.label: 94v
folio.l: And seide , he dide al this , at here request
And they witú humble entent , ful buxumly
Knelyngö vp oon here knees , ful reuerently
Hym thanken alle , and thus they han an ende
Of here entent , and hom a geyn they wende
¢ And heere vp on , he vn to hise officers
Comaundetú , for the feest to purueye
And to his pryue knygútis , and Squyers
Swicú charge ©af , as hi~ list on he~ leye
And they , to his comaundement , obeye
And ecú of hem dootú , al his diligence
To don vn to the feest , reuerence
Nougút fer , fro thilke paleys , honurable

note.notetxt: 196Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included. This has not been completed, possibly because there are other glosses indicating the end of the first part and the beginning of the second.Est

folio.l: Where as the Markys , shop~ his mariage
There stod a Thrope , of sygút delitable
In whicú , that poore folk , of that village
Hadden here beestes , and here herbergage
And of here labour , token here sustenaunce
After that the erthe , ©af he~ habundaunce
¢ A monges theise poore folk , there dwelt a man
Whicú that was holden , poorest of hem alle
But heye god , somtyme senden can
His grace , in to a litel Oxes stalle
Ianycola , men of that Throp~ hi~ calle
A dougúter had he , fair I now to sigút
And Grysildes , this ©onge mayden higút
¢ But for to speke , of vertuous beaute
Than was she oon , of the fayrest vnder Sonne
Ful poorely , I fostred vp , was she
No lykerous lust , was in hire hert I ronne
Wel oftere of the welle , than of the Tonne
She dranke , and for she wolde vertu plese
She knew wel labour , but noon Idel eese
¢ But thougú this Mayde , tendre were of age
ñet in the breest , of hire virgynytee
There was enclosed , ripe and sad corage
And in gret reuerence , and charitee
Hire olde poore fader , fostred she
A fewe shepe , spynnyngö on the feld , she kepte
She wolde nougút ben Idel , til she slepte
¢ And whan she homward cam , she wolde brynge
Wortes , or other Erbes , tymes ofte
The whicú she shredde , and setú for here lyuynge
And mad hire bed ful hard , and no thyngö softe
And ay she kepte , hire fadres lyf on lofte
Witú euäy obeisaunce , and diligence
That child may don , to fadres reuerence
